title: Unova Legends
description:
Cobblemon Pack
Several QoL and Performance Mods.
The server includes mods such as Mega Evolution, Paradox Pokemon, Player run Gyms as well as NPC Gyms, Space Distortion, Raids, a new Generation of Pokemons and much more!
body:
This pack is the Official Unova Legends Cobblemon Modpack. We have several features added which makes the Cobblemon Mod even more enjoyable. It is recommended to put your RAM settings to 3-4 GB.

<details>
<summary>Server Features</summary>

- Raids
- Custom Gym Mod With Badges
- Gyms (NPC and Player Run)
- Claiming System
- Breeding
- Wonder Trade System
- GTS
- Mega Evolution
- Player Shops
- Space Distortion (Outbreaks)
- Hunting Bounties
- Server Shop
- PokeNav
- PC Variations
- Pokemon Plushies
- NPC Trainers Roaming The Wilderness
- Ride/Mount Functions
- Added Generation Of Pokemons
- New Regional Forms
- Shadow Pokemons
- Pokedex
- Poke Builder (Using Battle Points)
- Custom Biomes
- Exp and EV Hub
- Cosmetic Alternatives
- Extra Building & Decoration Blocks
- Seasons Changing
- Quests
- and more!
</details>

Join our Discord for more info: [https://discord.gg/NqNKDUB](https://discord.gg/NqNKDUB)

Server IP: play.unovalegends.net
